title: Royapuram Peter Lyrics Maan Karate Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Royapuram Peter
Singer:  Sivakarthikeyan, Paravai Muniamma
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Maan Karate
Lyrics: R D Raja

Ye rayapuram peter-u
rounds ivan matter-u
(hey soundu uethapppaa)
ye come on come on come on

naaney enga veetu pulla yilla
unga veetu pullanu sollreney.
naanga ellaarumey chennaiyoda
chella pulla sounda solluveney

Aruvada soru thinnu
all time-u oora suthum
ambala singam thaaney

Friends kkaada pala figarungala
kalatti vitta agmarkku thangam naaney

udhaar udhaar udhaar udhaar peteru
dubaar dubaar dubaar dubaakur peteru

ye orey timela rendu maanga
adikka poraan peteru
bulb vaangi bulb vaangi
aayiputtaan jokkeru

Schoolu thevayilla college thevayilla
paadam katthu tharra life mattum podhumey

vela venaamey kaasu venaamey
pasanga kooda suthum natpu mattum podhumey
pub thevayila club thevyila
kutthu gaana paattu ketta mattum podhumey

rummu venaameu dhammu venaamey
love panna mattum ponnu onnu podhumey

naaney enga veetu pulla yilla
unga veetu pullanu sollreney.
naanga ellaarumey chennaiyoda
chella pulla sounda solluveney

Aruvada soru thinnu
all time-u oora suthum
ambala singam thaaney

Friends kkaada pala figarungala
kalatti vitta agmarkku thangam naaney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Royapuram Peter'?

The song 'Royapuram Peter' celebrates the lively spirit of the protagonist, showcasing his confidence and charm in a fun and energetic manner.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Maan Karate'?

This song highlights the carefree and adventurous nature of the main character, reflecting the film's overall theme of youth and ambition.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by Paravai Muniyamma and Siva Karthikeyan, with music composed by Anirudh.

When was 'Royapuram Peter' released?

'Royapuram Peter' was released on March 16, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Royapuram Peter', the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy life. This song serves as a backdrop to key moments in Maan Karate, emphasizing the protagonist's adventurous journey. With its infectious rhythm, it resonates with anyone looking to celebrate special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Royapuram Peter from Maan Karate is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the unique collaboration of Paravai Muniyamma and Siva Karthikeyan. With Anirudh's infectious beats, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Dive into the lively world of this track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance!
stanzaMeanings: This Royapuram Peter is all about rounds and matters (hey sound).
In this house, we don't know how to fight.
Come on, come on, come on.
I say I'm not from your house, I'm from my house. We all are the cool kids of Chennai.
Eating good food all the time, roaming around like a lion.
Among friends, I am the one who stands out with style.
Here and there, Peter is everywhere, everywhere, everywhere.
In this one place, two mangoes are going to be hit, Peter has bought a bulb and has become a joker.
No need for school, no need for college, just learning is enough for life.
No need for work, no need for money, just friendship is enough, only listening to dance songs is enough.
No need for rum, no need for money, just love is enough for one girl.
I say I'm not from your house, I'm from my house. We all are the cool kids of Chennai.
Eating good food all the time, roaming around like a lion.
Among friends, I am the one who stands out with style.
